content_fingerprint: n8n publishes guide on evaluating and monitoring ai workflows in production the workflow automation platform n8n has released a detailed playbook covering how teams can track ai performance use llm as a judge scoring and catch model drift before it affects end users n8n published a new guide on may 5 2026 titled production ai playbook evaluation and monitoring written by elvis saravia of the n8n team the 18 minute post addresses a persistent challenge in deployed ai systems the silent degradation of workflows that once performed reliably the guide walks through three core practices first it co
